src/utils/index.ts:export function getDeviceInfo() {
src/utils/index.ts:  const ua = navigator.userAgent;
src/utils/index.ts:  let device = "Ordinateur";
src/utils/index.ts:  
src/utils/index.ts:  if (/android/i.test(ua)) device = "Android";
src/utils/index.ts:  else if (/iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(ua)) device = "iOS Device";
src/utils/index.ts:  else if (/Windows/i.test(ua)) device = "Windows PC";
src/utils/index.ts:  else if (/Macintosh/i.test(ua)) device = "Mac";
src/utils/index.ts:  else if (/Linux/i.test(ua)) device = "Linux";
src/utils/index.ts:
src/utils/index.ts:  // Browser detection
src/utils/index.ts:  let browser = "Navigateur";
src/utils/index.ts:  if (/chrome|crios/i.test(ua) && !/edge/i.test(ua)) browser = "Chrome";
src/utils/index.ts:  else if (/firefox|fxios/i.test(ua)) browser = "Firefox";
src/utils/index.ts:  else if (/safari/i.test(ua) && !/chrome|crios/i.test(ua)) browser = "Safari";
src/utils/index.ts:  else if (/edge/i.test(ua)) browser = "Edge";
src/utils/index.ts:
src/utils/index.ts:  return `${device} (${browser})`;
src/utils/index.ts:}
src/utils/image-compression.ts:
src/utils/image-compression.ts:/**
src/utils/image-compression.ts: * Compresse une image avant l'upload pour éviter de dépasser la limite de 1 Mo de Firestore
src/utils/image-compression.ts: * et pour améliorer les performances de chargement.
src/utils/image-compression.ts: */
src/utils/image-compression.ts:export async function compressImage(file: File, maxWidth = 400, maxHeight = 400, quality = 0.7): Promise<File> {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/utils/image-compression.ts:    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/utils/image-compression.ts:    reader.onload = (event) => {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:      const img = new Image();
src/utils/image-compression.ts:      img.src = event.target?.result as string;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:      img.onload = () => {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        let width = img.width;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        let height = img.height;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        // Calculer les nouvelles dimensions tout en conservant le ratio
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        if (width > height) {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          if (width > maxWidth) {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            height *= maxWidth / width;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            width = maxWidth;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          }
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        } else {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          if (height > maxHeight) {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            width *= maxHeight / height;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            height = maxHeight;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          }
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        }
src/utils/image-compression.ts:
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        canvas.width = width;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        canvas.height = height;
src/utils/image-compression.ts:
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        if (!ctx) {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          return reject(new Error('Canvas context could not be created'));
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        }
src/utils/image-compression.ts:
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/utils/image-compression.ts:
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        canvas.toBlob(
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          (blob) => {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            if (!blob) {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:              return reject(new Error('Canvas blob could not be created'));
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            }
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            const compressedFile = new File([blob], file.name, {
src/utils/image-compression.ts:              type: 'image/jpeg',
src/utils/image-compression.ts:              lastModified: Date.now(),
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            });
src/utils/image-compression.ts:            resolve(compressedFile);
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          },
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          'image/jpeg',
src/utils/image-compression.ts:          quality
src/utils/image-compression.ts:        );
src/utils/image-compression.ts:      };
src/utils/image-compression.ts:      img.onerror = (err) => reject(err);
src/utils/image-compression.ts:    };
src/utils/image-compression.ts:    reader.onerror = (err) => reject(err);
src/utils/image-compression.ts:  });
src/utils/image-compression.ts:}

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:export default function StudentDashboard() {

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      try {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        const res = await fetchWithAuth('/api/auth/me');
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        if (res.ok) {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:          const currentProfile = await res.json();
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:          updateProfile(currentProfile);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        }

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    };
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    const fetchFinances = async () => {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      if (!user?.uid) return;
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      try {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        const scolariteSnap = await getDoc(doc(db, 'scolarites', user.uid));
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        if (scolariteSnap.exists()) {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:          setScolarite(scolariteSnap.data() as StudentScolarite);

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        vList.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        setVersements(vList);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      } catch(e) {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        console.error("Error fetching finances", e);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      } finally {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        setLoadingFinances(false);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      }

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const studentClass = student.classId ? classes.find(c => c.id === student.classId) || null : null;
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const studentLevel = student.levelId ? levels.find(l => l.id === student.levelId) || null : null;
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const recentLibrary = library.slice(0, 4);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const studentEvaluations = evaluations
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    .filter(e => e.studentId === student.uid)
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime())

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const recentCommuniques = communiques
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    .filter(c => c.targetRoles.includes('student') && !c.isArchived)
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime())
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    .slice(0, 3);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  if (loading || loadingFinances) {
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    return (
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full">
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-t-2 border-b-2 border-dia-red"></div>
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      </div>

src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  }
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const totalPaid = scolarite ? (scolarite.total_verse || 0) : (student.payments?.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.amount || 0), 0) || 0);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const tuition = scolarite ? (scolarite.montant_total_du || 0) : (studentLevel?.tuition || 0);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const balance = scolarite ? (scolarite.reste || 0) : Math.max(0, tuition - totalPaid);
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  const paymentProgress = tuition > 0 ? (totalPaid / tuition) * 100 : 0;
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:  return (
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8 pb-10">
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      {/* Welcome Section */}
src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx:      <div className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-[32px] bg-dia-red p-8 text-white shadow-2xl shadow-dia-red/20">

src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:              {hours.map((hour) => (

src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                  </div>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                  {days.map((day) => {
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                    // Find classes for this day and hour
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                    const scheduledClasses = teacherClasses.filter(cls => 
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                      cls.schedule?.some(s => 
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                        s.day === day && 
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                        parseInt(s.startTime.split(':')[0]) <= hour && 
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                        parseInt(s.endTime.split(':')[0]) > hour
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                      )
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                    );
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                    return (
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                      <div key={`${day}-${hour}`} className="border-r border-neutral-50 last:border-r-0 relative p-1">
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                        {scheduledClasses.map((cls, idx) => {
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                          const schedule = cls.schedule.find(s => s.day === day);
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                          if (!schedule || parseInt(schedule.startTime.split(':')[0]) !== hour) return null;
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                          
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                          const duration = parseInt(schedule.endTime.split(':')[0]) - parseInt(schedule.startTime.split(':')[0]);
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                          
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                          return (
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                            <div 
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                              key={cls.id}
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                              className={cn(
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                "absolute inset-x-1 z-10 p-2 rounded-xl border shadow-sm transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] cursor-pointer",
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                "bg-dia-red/5 border-dia-red/20 text-dia-red"
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                              )}
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                              style={{ 
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                height: `${duration * 80 - 8}px`,
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                top: '4px'
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                              }}
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                            >
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                              <div className="flex flex-col h-full justify-between">
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                <div>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                  <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase leading-none mb-1 opacity-70">{cls.name}</p>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                  <p className="text-xs font-bold truncate">{schedule.subject || 'Cours d\'Allemand'}</p>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                </div>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 opacity-70">
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                  <Clock size={10} />
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                  <span className="text-[10px] font-bold">{schedule.startTime} - {schedule.endTime}</span>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                                </div>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                              </div>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                            </div>
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                          );
src/pages/TeacherPlanning.tsx:                        })}

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:  }, [refreshLibrary]);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:  const handleAddItem = async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:    if (!canManage || submitting) return;
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:    setSubmitting(true);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:    const formData = new FormData(e.currentTarget);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:    
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:    try {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:      if (addMethod === 'file') {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        const file = formData.get('file') as File;
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        if (!file || file.size === 0) {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          toast.error(t('library.select_file'));
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          setSubmitting(false);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          return;
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        }
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        const uploadData = new FormData();
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        uploadData.append('file', file);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        uploadData.append('title', formData.get('title') as string);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        uploadData.append('category', formData.get('category') as string);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        uploadData.append('type', formData.get('type') as string);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        const res = await fetchWithAuth('/api/library/upload', {

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          body: uploadData
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        });
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        if (res.ok) {

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          toast.success(t('library.item_added'), {

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:            duration: 5000,
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          });
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        } else {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          const err = await res.json();
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          toast.error(err.message || t('common.error'));
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        }
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        const newItem = {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          title: formData.get('title'),
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          category: formData.get('category'),
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          url: formData.get('url'),
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          type: formData.get('type'),

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        };
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        const res = await fetchWithAuth('/api/library', {

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify(newItem)
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        });
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        if (res.ok) {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          setIsAddModalOpen(false);
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          refreshLibrary();
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          toast.success(t('library.item_added'), {

src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          });
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        } else {
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({ message: t('common.error') }));
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:          toast.error(err.message || t('common.error'));
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:        }
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:      }
src/pages/LibraryManagement.tsx:    } catch (err) {

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            const hoursPerSubLevel = level.hours / 2;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            let payableHours = 0;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            let cumulative = 0;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // Logic: Pay hours if they are within quota OR if they are validated by admin
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            submittedReports.forEach((r: any) => {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              if (cumulative < hoursPerSubLevel) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                // Still within typical sub-level quota
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                const remainingInQuota = hoursPerSubLevel - cumulative;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                const hoursToPay = Math.min(r.duree_heures, remainingInQuota);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                payableHours += hoursToPay;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                // If this report goes beyond, check if the overage is validated
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                if (r.duree_heures > remainingInQuota) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  const overage = r.duree_heures - remainingInQuota;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  if (r.valide_par_admin) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                    payableHours += overage;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              } else {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                // Already exceeded sub-level quota, pay only if validated
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                if (r.valide_par_admin) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  payableHours += r.duree_heures;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              cumulative += r.duree_heures;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            });
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // Use the calculated payableHours instead of the fixed level.hours/2
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            const salaryAmount = payableHours * teacher.hourlyRate;

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:        }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:      } catch (err) {

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:      } finally {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:        setSubmitting(false);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:      }

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:      
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:      if (!nextLevel) {

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:      try {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:        setSubmitting(true);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:        // 1. Update Class
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:        const res = await fetchWithAuth(`/api/classes/${classId}`, {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          method: 'PUT',

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:        });
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          const teacher = teachers.find(t => t.id === cls.teacherId);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          if (level && teacher) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // Fetch reports for this class to calculate actual payable hours for sub-level 2
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            const reportsRes = await fetchWithAuth(`/api/reports?classId=${classId}`);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            const reports = await reportsRes.json();
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            const hoursPerSubLevel = level.hours / 2;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            let payableHours = 0;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            let cumulative = 0;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // We want ONLY the hours from sub-level 2
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // For simplicity, we calculate total sub-level 2 "eligible" hours
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // and subtract what was likely already paid in sub-level 1 if we had a more robust tracking
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // BUT here we can just target reports since the last promotion.
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // Since we don't have "promotion date", we'll just look at hours > level.hours/2
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            const submittedReports = reports.filter((r: any) => r.statut === 'soumis');
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            submittedReports.forEach((r: any) => {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              const reportStart = cumulative;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              const reportEnd = cumulative + r.duree_heures;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              // Only consider hours that fall in the second sub-level ( > level.hours / 2)
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              if (reportEnd > hoursPerSubLevel) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                const hoursInSubLevel2 = Math.max(0, reportEnd - Math.max(hoursPerSubLevel, reportStart));
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                // If within quota of level (total level.hours)
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                if (reportStart < level.hours) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  const remainingInQuota = level.hours - Math.max(hoursPerSubLevel, reportStart);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  const inQuotaToPay = Math.min(hoursInSubLevel2, Math.max(0, remainingInQuota));
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  payableHours += inQuotaToPay;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  // Excess within this report
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  if (hoursInSubLevel2 > remainingInQuota && r.valide_par_admin) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                     payableHours += (hoursInSubLevel2 - remainingInQuota);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                } else if (r.valide_par_admin) {
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  // Completely in excess
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                  payableHours += hoursInSubLevel2;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              cumulative += r.duree_heures;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            });

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            const salaryAmount = payableHours * teacher.hourlyRate;
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              method: 'PUT',
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            });

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              body: JSON.stringify({
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                type: 'expense',
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                amount: salaryAmount,
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                description: t('teachers.salary_expense', { teacher: `${teacher.firstName} ${teacher.lastName}`, className: cls.name, sub: 2 }),
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                category: 'Salary',
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:                date: new Date().toISOString()
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              })
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            });
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          }
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          // 2. Update all students in this class
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          const classStudents = students.filter(s => cls.studentIds.includes(s.id) && !s.isFormer);
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          for (const student of classStudents) {

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              method: 'PUT',
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:              body: JSON.stringify({ levelId: nextLevel.id })
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            });
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            
src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:            // Notify student & parent

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:          }

src/pages/ClassManagement.tsx:    if (aValue > bValue) return direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;

src/pages/FinanceManagement.tsx:        return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? nA - nB : nB - nA;
src/pages/FinanceManagement.tsx:      }
src/pages/FinanceManagement.tsx:
src/pages/FinanceManagement.tsx:      const sA = String(aVal || '').trim();

src/pages/FinanceManagement.tsx:    });
src/pages/FinanceManagement.tsx:  }, [viewMode, trashFinances, filteredByDate, sortConfig]);

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  const handleUpdatePayment = async (tranche: number | undefined, amount: number, category?: string, dateStr?: string) => {

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    let updatedPayments: TuitionPayment[];

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:          amount, 
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:          date: dateStr ? dt : (p.amount === 0 && amount > 0 ? dt : p.date),

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      );

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        date: dt,
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        receiptId: `REC-${Date.now()}`,
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        category: category as any || 'autre',
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        method: 'Espèces'
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      };

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    }

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  const exportToCSV = () => {

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    const rows = students.map(s => [

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  };
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  const sortedStudents = React.useMemo(() => {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    const filtered = students.filter(s => {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      const matchesSearch = `${s.lastName} ${s.firstName} ${s.matricule}`.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      const matchesTab = activeTab === 'active' ? !s.isFormer : s.isFormer;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      return matchesSearch && matchesTab;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    });
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    return [...filtered].sort((a, b) => {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      if (!sortConfig || !a || !b) return 0;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      const { key, direction } = sortConfig;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      let aValue: any;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      let bValue: any;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      if (key === 'name') {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const lastNameA = a.lastName || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const firstNameA = a.firstName || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const lastNameB = b.lastName || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const firstNameB = b.firstName || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const fullA = `${lastNameA} ${firstNameA}`.trim();
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const fullB = `${lastNameB} ${firstNameB}`.trim();
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const comp = fullA.localeCompare(fullB, 'fr', { sensitivity: 'base' });
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        return direction === 'asc' ? comp : -comp;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      } else if (key === 'matricule') {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        aValue = (a.matricule || '').toLowerCase();
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        bValue = (b.matricule || '').toLowerCase();
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      } else if (key === 'level') {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        aValue = levels.find(l => l.id === a.levelId)?.name?.toLowerCase() || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        bValue = levels.find(l => l.id === b.levelId)?.name?.toLowerCase() || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      } else if (key === 'class') {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        aValue = classes.find(c => c.id === a.classId)?.name?.toLowerCase() || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        bValue = classes.find(c => c.id === b.classId)?.name?.toLowerCase() || '';
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      } else if (key === 'tuition') {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const pA = a.payments || [];
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        const pB = b.payments || [];
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        aValue = pA.reduce((acc, p) => acc + (Number(p.amount) || 0), 0);
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        bValue = pB.reduce((acc, p) => acc + (Number(p.amount) || 0), 0);
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        aValue = (a as any)[key];
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:        bValue = (b as any)[key];
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      }
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      if (aValue < bValue) return direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      if (aValue > bValue) return direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:      return 0;
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    });
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  }, [students, searchQuery, activeTab, sortConfig, levels, classes]);
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  const paginatedStudents = React.useMemo(() => {
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:    return sortedStudents.slice(0, currentPage * itemsPerPage);
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  }, [sortedStudents, currentPage, itemsPerPage]);
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  const hasMore = sortedStudents.length > paginatedStudents.length;

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:  };
src/pages/StudentManagement.tsx:

src/pages/ReportManagement.tsx:                  </td>
src/pages/ReportManagement.tsx:                </tr>
src/pages/ReportManagement.tsx:              )}

src/pages/ReportManagement.tsx:    }

src/firebase.ts:async function testConnection() {
src/firebase.ts:  try {
src/firebase.ts:    // Try to read a dummy document to verify connection
src/firebase.ts:    await getDocFromServer(doc(db, 'test', 'connection'));
src/firebase.ts:    console.log("Firebase connection verified successfully.");
src/firebase.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/firebase.ts:    if (error instanceof Error && error.message.includes('the client is offline')) {
src/firebase.ts:      console.error("Firebase connection failed: The client is offline. Please check your Firebase configuration.");
src/firebase.ts:    } else {
src/firebase.ts:      // Other errors are expected if the document doesn't exist, but connection is still working
src/firebase.ts:      console.log("Firebase connection established (test read attempted).");
src/firebase.ts:    }
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:}

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:      if (reportsSnap) {

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:              if (!r.valide_par_admin) remunerated = false;

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:                rate,

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:            }

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:      }

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:      // Calculate Class Quota status for display

src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        const cls = classesMap[classId];
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        const level = cls ? levelsMap[cls.levelId] : null;
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        const quota = level?.hours || 0;
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        const diff = total - quota;
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        let quotaStatus: 'insuffisant' | 'ok' | 'depassement' = 'ok';
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        if (total < quota - 10) quotaStatus = 'insuffisant';
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        else if (total > quota + 10) quotaStatus = 'depassement';
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        return {
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:          className: cls?.name || 'Inconnue',
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:          total,
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:          quota,
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:          diff,
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:          status: quotaStatus
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:        };
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:      });
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:
src/components/Finance/RealFinanceDashboard.tsx:      // 3. Aggregger les CHARGES FIXES (Manual charges)

src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const newTotalVerse = recalculatedTotal;

src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const updatedScolarite = {

src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:  const handleDeletePayment = async (versementId: string) => {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    if (!targetStudent || !scolarite || !isSuperAdmin) return;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    if (!window.confirm("Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer définitivement ce versement ?")) return;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    try {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const versementToDelete = versements.find(v => v.id === versementId);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      if (!versementToDelete) return;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      // 1. Delete from subcollection
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'scolarites', scolarite.id, 'versements', versementId));
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      // 2. Sync with global finances if financeId exists
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      if (versementToDelete.financeId) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        try {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:          await fetchWithAuth(`/api/finances/${versementToDelete.financeId}`, {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            method: 'DELETE'
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:          });
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        } catch (finErr) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:          console.error("Finance deletion failed:", finErr);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      // 3. Recalculate totals
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const newTotalVerse = (scolarite.total_verse || 0) - versementToDelete.montant;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const newReste = Math.max(0, scolarite.montant_total_du - newTotalVerse);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const newSurplus = Math.max(0, newTotalVerse - scolarite.montant_total_du);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      let newStatut: StudentScolarite['statut_paiement'] = 'EN COURS';
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      if (newSurplus > 0) newStatut = 'SURPLUS';
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      else if (newReste === 0) newStatut = 'SOLDÉ';
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      else if (newTotalVerse === 0) newStatut = 'IMPAYÉ';
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const updatedScolarite = {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        ...scolarite,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        total_verse: newTotalVerse,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        reste: newReste,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        surplus: newSurplus,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        statut_paiement: newStatut
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      };
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'scolarites', scolarite.id), updatedScolarite);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      setScolarite(updatedScolarite);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      setVersements(versements.filter(v => v.id !== versementId));
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      addAuditLog("VERSEMENT_SUPPRIMÉ", targetStudent.uid, { 
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        versementId, 
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        montant: versementToDelete.montant,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        recu_numero: versementToDelete.recu_numero 
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      });
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      toast.success("Versement supprimé avec succès !");
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      console.error(err);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      toast.error("Erreur lors de la suppression du versement");
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:  };
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:  const handleUpdatePayment = async (versementId: string) => {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    if (!targetStudent || !scolarite || !isSuperAdmin) return;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:    try {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const versementToUpdate = versements.find(v => v.id === versementId);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      if (!versementToUpdate) return;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      // 1. Update the versement in subcollection
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const newDateStr = editDate ? new Date(editDate + 'T12:00:00Z').toISOString() : undefined;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      const updateData: any = {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        montant: editAmount,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        notes: editNotes,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        updated_at: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        updated_by: user.uid
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      };
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      if (newDateStr) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:          updateData.date = newDateStr;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'scolarites', scolarite.id, 'versements', versementId), updateData);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      // 2. Sync with global finances if financeId exists
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      if (versementToUpdate.financeId) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        try {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:          await fetchWithAuth(`/api/finances/${versementToUpdate.financeId}`, {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            method: 'PATCH',
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            body: JSON.stringify({
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:              amount: editAmount,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:              date: newDateStr || versementToUpdate.date
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            })
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:          });
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        } catch (finErr) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:          console.error("Finance update failed:", finErr);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        // Fallback: try to find the finance record by studentId and older amount
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        try {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            const financesRes = await fetchWithAuth('/api/finances');
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            if (financesRes.ok) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                const allFinances = await financesRes.json();
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                const relatedFinance = allFinances.find((f: any) => 
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    (f.studentId === targetStudent.uid || (f.description && f.description.includes(targetStudent.matricule))) && 
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    f.amount === versementToUpdate.montant &&
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    new Date(f.date).toDateString() === new Date(versementToUpdate.date).toDateString()
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                );
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                if (relatedFinance) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    await fetchWithAuth(`/api/finances/${relatedFinance.id}`, {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                        method: 'PATCH',
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                        body: JSON.stringify({
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                            amount: editAmount,
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                            date: newDateStr || versementToUpdate.date
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                        })
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    });
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    // Store the found ID back to the versement for future use
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    await updateDoc(doc(db, 'scolarites', scolarite.id, 'versements', versementId), {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                        financeId: relatedFinance.id
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                    });
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:                }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        } catch (fallbackErr) {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:            console.error("Finance fallback update failed:", fallbackErr);
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      }
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      // 3. Recalculate totals
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      let updatedVersements = versements.map(v => 
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        v.id === versementId ? { ...v, montant: editAmount, notes: editNotes, date: newDateStr || v.date } : v
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      );
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      // 4. Re-sort local list so it "moves" to correct position
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      updatedVersements.sort((a,b) => {
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        const dateA = a.date ? new Date(a.date).getTime() : 0;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        const dateB = b.date ? new Date(b.date).getTime() : 0;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:        return dateB - dateA;
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:      });
src/components/Finance/TuitionManagement.tsx:

src/context/AuthContext.tsx:  const validatePassword = (password: string) => {
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    const minLength = 6;
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    const hasUppercase = /[A-Z]/.test(password);
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    const hasDot = /\./.test(password);
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    const hasDigit = /\d/.test(password);
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    const { t } = i18n;
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    if (password.length < minLength) return { isValid: false, message: t('auth.password_too_short') };
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    if (!hasUppercase) return { isValid: false, message: t('auth.password_no_uppercase') };
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    if (!hasDot) return { isValid: false, message: t('auth.password_no_dot') };
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    if (!hasDigit) return { isValid: false, message: t('auth.password_no_digit') };
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:    return { isValid: true, message: "" };
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:  };
src/context/AuthContext.tsx:

src/context/AuthContext.tsx:  const fetchWithAuth = React.useCallback(async (url: string, options: RequestInit = {}) => {

src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:export function ThemeProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<'light' | 'dark'>(() => {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:      return (Cookies.get('theme') as 'light' | 'dark') || 'light';
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    }
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    return 'light';
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  });
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    const root = window.document.documentElement;
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    if (theme === 'dark') {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:      root.classList.add('dark');
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    } else {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:      root.classList.remove('dark');
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    }
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    Cookies.set('theme', theme, { expires: 365 });
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  }, [theme]);
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  const toggleTheme = () => {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    setTheme(prev => prev === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light');
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  };
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  return (
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    <ThemeContext.Provider value={{ theme, toggleTheme }}>
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:      {children}
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    </ThemeContext.Provider>
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  );
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:}
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:export function useTheme() {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  const context = useContext(ThemeContext);
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  if (context === undefined) {
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:    throw new Error('useTheme must be used within a ThemeProvider');
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  }
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:  return context;
src/context/ThemeContext.tsx:}

src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:  path: string | null;
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:  authInfo: {

src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:    authInfo: {
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:        providerId: provider.providerId,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:        displayName: provider.displayName,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:        email: provider.email,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:      })) || []
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:    },
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:    operationType,
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:    path
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:  }
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/services/firestoreUtils.ts:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));

src/services/NotificationService.ts:  /**
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   * Envoie une notification push via le backend.
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   */
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  async _triggerPushNotification(fetchWithAuth: any, to: string, pushTitle: string, pushBody: string) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    try {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      await fetchWithAuth('/api/notifications/send-push', {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:        method: 'POST',
src/services/NotificationService.ts:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/services/NotificationService.ts:        body: JSON.stringify({ to, pushTitle, pushBody })
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      });
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      return true;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    } catch (e) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      console.warn("Push failed:", e);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      return false;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  },

src/services/NotificationService.ts:   * Redirection WhatsApp réelle via lien wa.me
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   */
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  async _triggerWhatsApp(fetchWithAuth: any, phone: string, message: string) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    let waUrl = '';
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (phone) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      // Nettoyer le numéro (enlever les espaces, +, etc. pour wa.me)
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      const cleanPhone = phone.replace(/\D/g, '');
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      let finalPhone = cleanPhone;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      if (cleanPhone.length === 9) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:        finalPhone = '237' + cleanPhone; // Par défaut Cameroun si 9 chiffres
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      waUrl = `https://wa.me/${finalPhone}?text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    } else {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      // Si pas de téléphone, on propose le partage général
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      waUrl = `https://wa.me/?text=${encodeURIComponent(message)}`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Ouvrir dans un nouvel onglet
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    window.open(waUrl, '_blank');
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    return true;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  },
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  /**
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   * Notifie un utilisateur de ses identifiants de connexion.
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   */
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  async sendCredentials(fetchWithAuth: any, user: Student | Teacher, password: string, className?: string, schedule?: string) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    let message = `Bonjour ${user.firstName},\n\nBienvenue chez DIA_SAAS !\n\nVoici vos identifiants de connexion :\nMatricule : ${user.matricule}\nMot de passe : ${password}\n\n`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (className) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      message += `Vous avez été affecté à la classe : ${className}\n`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (schedule) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      message += `Jours de cours : ${schedule}\n`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    message += `\nLien de connexion : ${window.location.origin}/login`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    toast.info(`Identifiants générés pour ${user.firstName} (Envoyés via WhatsApp/Push)`);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send Push Notification
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    await this._triggerPushNotification(fetchWithAuth, user.email, "Vos identifiants DIA_SAAS", "Vos accès ont été configurés. Connectez-vous dès maintenant.");
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send WhatsApp if phone is available
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (user.phone) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      const waMessage = `Bienvenue chez DIA_SAAS!\nVoici vos identifiants:\nMatricule: ${user.matricule}\nMot de passe: ${password}\nLien: ${window.location.origin}/login`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      await this._triggerWhatsApp(fetchWithAuth, user.phone, waMessage);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send WhatsApp to parent if available
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if ('parentPhone' in user && user.parentPhone) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      const waParentMessage = `Bonjour,\nVotre enfant ${user.firstName} a été inscrit chez DIA_SAAS.\nMatricule: ${user.matricule}\nMot de passe: ${password}`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      await this._triggerWhatsApp(fetchWithAuth, (user as any).parentPhone as string, waParentMessage);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    return true;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  },
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  /**
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   * Envoie un rappel de paiement à un étudiant.
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   */
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  async sendPaymentReminder(fetchWithAuth: any, student: Student, tuition: number) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const totalPaid = student.payments.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.amount, 0);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const balance = tuition - totalPaid;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (balance <= 0) return true;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const message = `DIA_SAAS: Rappel de frais de scolarité pour ${student.firstName}.\nSolde restant: ${formatCurrency(balance)}. Merci de régulariser votre situation sur ${window.location.origin}/login`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send Push
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    await this._triggerPushNotification(fetchWithAuth, student.email, "Rappel de Scolarité", `Solde restant: ${formatCurrency(balance)}. Merci de régulariser votre situation.`);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send WhatsApp if phone is available
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (student.phone) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      await this._triggerWhatsApp(fetchWithAuth, student.phone, message);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:

src/services/NotificationService.ts:   */
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  async sendEventUpdate(fetchWithAuth: any, user: Student | Teacher, type: 'course' | 'exam', action: 'added' | 'cancelled' | 'modified', details: { className: string, subject: string, date?: string, time?: string }) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const typeLabel = type === 'exam' ? 'Examen' : 'Cours';
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const actionLabel = action === 'added' ? 'Programmé' : action === 'cancelled' ? 'Annulé' : 'Modifié';
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const waMessage = `DIA_SAAS: ${typeLabel} ${actionLabel} - ${details.subject}.\n${details.date ? `Date: ${details.date}\n` : ''}${details.time ? `Heure: ${details.time}` : ''}`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send Push
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const pushTitle = `${typeLabel} ${actionLabel}`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    const pushBody = `${details.subject} (${details.className})${details.date ? ` le ${details.date}` : ''}${details.time ? ` à ${details.time}` : ''}`;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    await this._triggerPushNotification(fetchWithAuth, user.email, pushTitle, pushBody);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send WhatsApp if phone is available
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (user.phone) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      await this._triggerWhatsApp(fetchWithAuth, user.phone, waMessage);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    return true;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  },
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  /**
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   * Notifie d'un nouveau communiqué.
src/services/NotificationService.ts:   */

src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (pushTitle && pushBody) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      await this._triggerPushNotification(fetchWithAuth, user.email, pushTitle, pushBody);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    // Send WhatsApp
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    if (user.phone) {
src/services/NotificationService.ts:      await this._triggerWhatsApp(fetchWithAuth, user.phone, `${subject}: ${message}`);
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    }
src/services/NotificationService.ts:
src/services/NotificationService.ts:    return true;
src/services/NotificationService.ts:  }
